cast.name: 阿尔卡迪乌什·雅库比克 Arkadiusz Jakubik
安娜·斯莫沃维克 Anna Smolowik
阿加塔·图科特 Agata Turkot

introduction: 10 year-old Hania moves towns after her mom’s death. At school, her belief in pixies, kindled by her late mom, makes her the object of ridicule. Bullies steal her pendant, a gift from a pixie, and she must now prove their existence or she will lose it forever.Hania persuades the school outcast Michał to join forces. Together they meet Sindri, the pixie living in the nearby woods, who promises to help them – in return for completing different tasks and helping take care of the forest. An adventure full of twists and turns begins, during which Hania will learn the power of friendship, the negative effects of lies, and finally come to terms with the loss of her mother.
